information.name: FALIQ
introduction: Hello! I'm Faliq, and I build for the web. I get genuinely excited about clean architecture and code, and everything that happens from the first line of code to the final deployment.
I'm also really leaning into cloud computing. I enjoy configuring and managing cloud infrastructure to build scalable and reliable solutions.

As a game developer, I enjoy level designing and custom engine data serialization. I am passionate about crafting immersive, deliberately designed environments that guide the player naturally, backed by a strong technical foundation in building robust data systems and internal developer tools.
Please find my contact details in my LinkedIn profile if you wish to connect. Let's build something together!

responsibilities: Developed and optimised autonomous behaviours for NAO robot using Python and Choregraphe, focusing on social robotics applications for concierge and entertainment
Designed and deployed web-based control interfaces using HTML, CSS and JavaScript to allow users to interact with NAO
Delivered live demonstrations to clients to validate requirements and provided immediate technical consultations to address inquiries
Trained in Java and Pega development before being transferred internally to the Technical Architecture team to assist in designing and maintaining scalable enterprise solutions
Managed cloud infrastructure setup on Microsoft Azure, implemented Server Hardening and network isolation protocols to ensure secure environment for sensitive data
Developed & Deployed automation scripts with PowerShell and Azure DevOps Pipelines to streamline deployments and tasks across servers and MS SQL databases
Established monitoring and maintenance using ManageEngine Applications Manager, maintaining 24/7 system stability and high availability
Resolved technical tickets to maintain high client satisfaction rate through efficient debugging in .NET and SQL
Developed and deployed feature changes that aligns with client’s requests and improving application performance against demanding traffic
Strengthened application security by resolving critical vulnerabilities identified in VAPT assessments, hardening application to ensure full compliance with industry data protection standards

educations.institution: Singapore Institute of Technology & Digipen Institute of Technology
educations.degree: Bachelor's of Science in Computer Science in Interactive Media & Game Development

projects.name: SingaPourCast - Scalable Weather Forecasting Cloud Infrastructure

descriptions.description: SingaPourCast is a Cloud Computing module school project focused on the hands-on deployment of a weather forecasting and email subscription app on AWS. While the app itself is simple, the real goal was to build a full, production-ready infrastructure to show how real-world cloud systems work.
Set up a 7-instance architecture that uses an Elastic Load Balancer (ELB) and an Auto Scaling Group (ASG) to keep the web servers highly available.
configured specific Route Tables and Security Group rules so the public can only access the web tier.
Isolated the batch (backend) server, which handles the email intervals, to only take traffic from the web servers.
RDS database is locked down to receive data strictly from the web and batch tiers.

MyResume is a cloud-native personal portfolio project developed to demonstrate the evolution of cloud architecture from traditional deployment to serverless infrastructure. Built as an applied learning project, it was executed across four distinct phases to showcase a deep understanding of cloud migration and Automation.
Phase 1: I initially built the application using a traditional virtualized stack (React/TypeScript, C# .NET Core WebAPI, and SQL) via manual cloud configuration ("ClickOps").
Phase 2: I then matured the infrastructure by provisioning the entire stack using Terraform for Infrastructure as Code (IaC).

Phase 3: To demonstrate modern cloud optimization, the project was completely refactored into a fully decoupled, Serverless architecture leveraging Azure Static Web Apps, Azure Functions, and an Azure Cosmos DB NoSQL database.
Phase 4: Serverless architecture deployed with Terraform. The project is then optimised for cost and speed and established CI/CD with automated tests.

Seven11 is a 2D grid-based puzzle game built in C++ using DigiPen's CProcessing library. The game blends the box-pushing mechanics of Sokoban with roguelike elements. Navigate the convenience store aisles, push inventory boxes to their objectives, and whatever you do, don't bump into the customers! Clear the level, pick a buff (or a debuff), and see how long you can survive the shift.

Hopwards is a 2D isometric puzzle-platformer built in C++ using DigiPen's Alpha Engine. The game creates a mind-bending 3D illusion where you control a wizard on his first day of school. He needs to navigate a perplexed maze of animated, shifting stairs to make it to class on time or face immediate expulsion. Tactically leap through levels, rotate stairs, uncover hidden bridges, and use Blue Flame Teleportation to survive the orientation day from hell.

projects.name: Driving Sim - Android Game Featuring Gyroscope-based Vehicle Control

descriptions.description: Driving Sim is an endless runner game where players take the wheel of a car that never stops. Your only objective is to survive the open road by weaving left and right to dodge incoming obstacles. The longer you stay on the asphalt without crashing, the further you travel. Once you hit an obstacle, the engine cuts, the run ends, and your final score is tallied based on your total distance.

projects.name: Forged In Flames: Dilemma - 3D Handcrafted Narrative Game

descriptions.description: An ordinary day in the town square turns into a living nightmare. An unexpected explosion rips through the city, knocking you unconscious. When you awake, the square is ablaze, and your wife and daughter are missing. As a retired firefighter, you refuse to wait for backup. You must rely on your old instincts to navigate the burning ruins, find your family, and uncover a dark truth, was this a tragic accident, or a deliberate act of arson?

Developed as a student project, "Forged In Flames: Dilemma" serves as a focused application of handcrafted 3D level design best practices. Every corner of this environment has been meticulously structured to guide the player and enhance the narrative tension.
Intuitive Layout: The level architecture uses natural choke points, framing, and distinct landmarks to guide player pathfinding organically without relying on intrusive UI or arrows.
Visual Guiding & Lighting: Fire, smoke, and dynamic light sources act as visual "breadcrumbs" to naturally draw the player's eye toward key narrative beats and interactive points.
Pacing & Tension: The map layout deliberately balances tight, claustrophobic debris corridors with wide, chaotic open spaces to mirror the protagonist's rising panic and keep exploration engaging.
W, A, S, D - Move Protagonist
E - Interact (Pick Up items, open doors, rescue civilians, etc.)

projects.name: Forged In Flames: Fate's Trigger - 2D Procedural Dungeon Crawler

descriptions.description: You are a firefighter trapped inside a collapsing building filled with Infernal Spawn, demonic monsters born from the flames. Every playthrough features a brand-new, procedurally generated layout, forcing you to rely on your dynamic minimap and navigate a blinding Fog of War. Use your trusty firehose to clear the blazes, defeat powerful bosses to unlock upgraded weaponry and defensive abilities, and stop the horde from pouring into the world!
"Forged In Flames -Fate's Trigger" is a top-down, procedural dungeon crawler developed as a student project.

Dynamic, Varied Enemies: Battle a diverse horde of Infernal Spawns, each featuring distinct behaviors and elemental fire traits. Players must constantly adapt their movement and positioning to counter different enemy attack patterns.

Engaging Boss Encounters & Progression: Face off against powerful, stage-ruling bosses like Ray Burnz and Smoky Jake. Defeating these bosses isn't just for progression, it rewards the player with game-changing tools and mechanics that alter how they navigate the dungeon.

An Evolving, Tactical Arsenal: Upgrade from a standard primary firehose to an advanced arsenal. Unlock the high-output Auto Hose MK II for crowd control, deploy Ice Bombs for explosive area damage, and Erect Walls to manipulate enemy pathfinding and create defensive choke points.
W, A, S, D - Move Firefighter
RMB - Auto Hose MK II (Unlock: Defeat Ray Burnz)
Scroll Click - Water Bomb (Unlock: Defeat Smoky Jake)
R - Erect Wall (Unlock: Defeat Smoky Jake)
G - Toggle Minimap (A bit Bugged, try pressing again to work)
O - +100 Auto Hose MK II Ammo
J - God Mode (No Damage Taken, Instant Kill)
K - Invincible Mode (No Damage Taken, Normal Damage Dealt)
Defeating Torch Head Ted when it is near a wall may spawn the collectibiles in the walls.

projects.name: Smart AI Steering Car - Driving Simulation Implementing Intelligent Car AI

descriptions.description: Smart AI Steering Car is a car simulator designed to showcase a vehicle navigating down a street autonomously. Its core features include automatic lane changing, adherence to traffic light signals, and stopping for pedestrian crossings. This is a student project focused on implementing Artificial Intelligence in simulations.
CONTROLS: There are no controls, this is a simulation

projects.name: Iron Dome - 2D Stationary Tower Defense Game

descriptions.description: Iron Dome is a hybrid of 2D Tower Defense and Bullet Hell that is built entirely from scratch. Players step into the hot seat of a stationary base turret to defend a lone outpost from relentless waves of airborne threats. Survive the brutal, bullet-riddled night assaults, then use the safety of the daytime to repair your base, manage resources, and strategically upgrade your arsenal to withstand the next night’s escalating chaos.
Developed as an advanced student project, Iron Dome was built completely from the ground up using a custom C++ game engine, rather than relying on commercial software like Unity or Unreal.

Custom Engine Tooling: Architected the engine's internal developer tools by integrating and configuring the Dear ImGui framework, allowing for real-time debugging, performance monitoring, and live value-tweaking during gameplay.

Robust Data Serialization: Implemented a robust data serialization system using yaml-cpp to handle game states, asset loading, and upgrade progression, ensuring seamless data saving/loading and cleaner game architecture.
Project Manager/AI States Programmer - Jerell: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jerelltan/

projects.name: Bots TD - 3D First-person Tower Defense Game

descriptions.description: Bots TD flips the classic tower defense genre on its head by plunging players directly into the action with a first-person 3D perspective. Instead of playing as an commander in the sky, you are a defense architect on the ground, actively sprinting across the map to construct, manage, and upgrade defensive towers. You must think on your feet and utilize the terrain to defend your objective from relentless, escalating waves of AI-driven combat bots.

Built entirely from scratch as an advanced student project, Bots TD runs on a custom C++ 3D game engine. This project showcases the complexities of rendering 3D environments, real-time lighting, 3D physics and data management without the aid of commercial engines.

Robust Data Serialization: Architected and implemented the engine's serialization system using yaml-cpp, enabling efficient saving and loading of complex game data, including tower configurations, player states, game prefabs and map layouts.

Assistant Graphics Programming: Contributed directly to the engine's rendering pipeline, assisting in the implementation of 3D asset rendering, shader management, and visual optimizations to ensure smooth performance during heavy combat waves.
